_comment: Reference schema for a demo file. Real demos drop the leading underscore. Each demo bundles the original prompt, the 2D SDF code, and the lifted 3D SceneData — together they let a visitor see (a) what they typed, (b) what 2D code came out, (c) the 3D world that lifted from it. Gallery loads sceneData directly without API key.
title: Example Title
prompt: The original user prompt that was typed into the text-tab.
